editions.title: Clinical Edition
editions.desc: FDA-pathway compliant. Designed for clinical environments with certified safety protocols.

editions.title: Enterprise Edition
editions.desc: Full-scale deployment for institutions. High-throughput data and multi-user access.

sensors.label: 128 Channels
sensors.desc: Standard density. Ideal for targeted cortical mapping.

sensors.label: 256 Channels
sensors.desc: High density. Full-hemisphere coverage with sub-millimeter precision.

sensors.label: 512 Channels
sensors.desc: Ultra density. Whole-brain capture for advanced research protocols.

storage.title: Local-Only
storage.desc: Air-gapped operation. All processing and storage remains on-premises.

storage.title: Cloud-Sync (1 Year)
storage.desc: Real-time data streaming to Neurolab Cloud with automated analysis pipelines.
